[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111111111 a
1 1111111111 a
2 1110110111 8
3 1101111101 8
4 1110000011 5
5 1011111111 9
6 0111110011 7
7 1111111100 8

01 0000010011 3
12 1100110101 6
23 1110000010 4
34 1010110001 5
45 0111110011 7 match 6
56 1101010000 4
67 0000010111 4
70 0010100001 3

02 0011011001 5
13 1101001000 4
24 1011001100 5
35 0010111101 6
46 0101011100 5
57 0010111000 4
60 1101001001 5
71 1101001101 6

03 0010100100 3
14 1000000110 3
25 0011000000 2
36 0000010010 2
47 1010110100 5
50 1111100110 7
61 0010100101 4
72 1110000111 6

04 0111101010 6
15 0000001010 2
26 0001101111 6
37 1111111010 8
40 0111101010 6
51 0000001010 2
62 0001101111 6
73 1111111010 8

05 1111100110 7
16 0010100101 4
27 1110000111 6
30 0010100100 3
41 1000000110 3
52 0011000000 2
63 0000010010 2
74 1010110100 5

06 1101001001 5
17 1101001101 6
20 0011011001 5
31 1101001000 4

53 0010111101 6
64 0101011100 5
75 0010111000 4

07 0010100001 3
10 0000010011 3
21 1100110101 6
32 1110000010 4
43 1010110001 5
54 0111110011 7 match 6
65 1101010000 4
76 0000010111 4
